entry.data:
PARTLY SUNNY
COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 50S
NORTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SHOWERS
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
NORTHEAST WINDS AROUND 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

CLOUDY
SHOWERS, MAINLY IN THE MORNING
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 40S
EAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 80 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING, THEN SHOWERS LIKELY AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE MID 40S
SOUTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE MORNING
NOT AS COOL WITH HIGHS AROUND 70
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
NOT AS COOL WITH LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING
SHOWERS LIKELY
LOWS IN THE MID 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY
HIGHS AROUND 70
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING, THEN SHOWERS LIKELY AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE MID 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT
